title: Strawberry Cookie Cutter 7-8cm | 3D Printed PLA Fruit Baking Tool | Berry Fondant Cutter Medium Size
description:
Strawberry Cookie Cutter – Add a Sweet Berry Touch to Your Baking!

Bring the charm of fresh summer strawberries to your kitchen with this adorable strawberry-shaped cookie cutter. Whether you're baking sugar cookies for a garden party, decorating a berry-themed birthday celebration, or simply having fun in the kitchen with your little ones, this delightful fruit-shaped cutter will help you create perfectly shaped strawberry cookies every single time. Designed with clean, crisp cutting edges and a comfortable grip, this cookie cutter makes baking both easy and enjoyable.

Features:
• Detailed strawberry silhouette design with leaf detail at the top
• Clean, sharp cutting edges for precise dough shapes
• Lightweight yet sturdy 3D-printed construction
• Comfortable to press and easy to handle
• Works beautifully with cookie dough, fondant, craft clay, play dough, and more
• Designed and printed with care in our small workshop

Dimensions:
This listing is for a Medium (M) size cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its tallest point. This is a versatile, go-to size that works perfectly for standard cookie trays and decorated sugar cookies. The cutter depth is approximately 1cm, which is ideal for most rolled cookie dough thicknesses.

How to Use:
Roll out your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-7mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the strawberry cookie cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift and remove excess dough from around the shape. Transfer your strawberry cut-outs to a lined baking sheet and bake according to your recipe. For fondant or gum paste, lightly dust the cutter with cornstarch or powdered sugar before pressing to prevent sticking. Always remove the cutter before baking — it is not oven safe.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. Simply rinse under lukewarm water with mild soap after each use and allow to air dry completely before storing. Avoid soaking the cutter in water or exposing it to high temperatures, as PLA can warp when exposed to excessive heat. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain the shape and quality of your cutter for years to come.

Perfect Gift Ideas:
This strawberry cookie cutter makes a wonderful gift for bakers of all skill levels and ages. It is an ideal stocking stuffer during the holiday season or a thoughtful addition to a baking gift basket for a friend who loves to create in the kitchen. Consider gifting it for birthdays, housewarming parties, bridal showers, or teacher appreciation gifts. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for a personal and creative present. Kids especially love using fun-shaped cutters, making this a fantastic addition to a children's baking set or party favor bag.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is designed and 3D printed to order in our small home-based workshop. We take pride in handmade, small-batch production, ensuring each piece meets our quality standards before it ships to you. Because every item is printed fresh upon ordering, we can offer a wide variety of unique designs you won't find in traditional stores. Thank you for supporting small, independent creators — we truly appreciate your business and hope this little strawberry brings joy to your baking adventures!
